name: Blade vs Undead
short_description: This is a top-down survival shooter game where players must fight for survival on a battlefield filled with skeleton soldiers.
detailed_description:
• The game is easy and relaxing to play, requiring only mouse control, making it suitable for both casual and challenging gameplay.

  • Left-click to swing your sword and release sword energy, precisely slashing enemies. When the energy bar is full, right-click to unleash a powerful ultimate skill to sweep the battlefield.

  • Defeat the endless waves of skeleton soldiers, collect coins, and unlock 10 unique sword wave skins.

  • Face the relentless onslaught of skeleton hordes from all directions, experiencing thrilling hack-and-slash combat and intense battles!

  • Whether you're looking for a casual experience or an extreme challenge, this game will deliver an exhilarating combat adventure!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
